Welcome to DBGT Network Version 5.0. Fully re-designed to give easier navigation and interface. The DBGT Network webmaster & staff are dedicated to offer you the best Dragon Ball content from all over the net. Many features of the site are always being improved to please the visitor. If you don't like something on this site don't hesitate to tell us what it is. This site has grown to be one of the most interactive sites on the net today. Enjoy your visit!
All news posts reported here is strictly for dbgt.com only. You may post any news on your site only with a source link back to ours. All news reported here is sourced if obtained elsewhere.

Celebrity Chat
 I just picked this up today, but if you haven't heard, keep reading. Wednesday June 5 Eric Vale, the voice of Dragon Ball Zs Trunks and Blue Genders Yuji, will be chatting with fans in the Official FUNimation Chat World. Vale is also a writer for FUNimation. The chat will kick off at 7:00 p.m. Eastern Standard Time and 4:00 p.m. Pacific Standard Time. This is your chance to talk live with one todays hottest voice actors. I'll be sure to pop a question.

source: DragonballZ.com

 Register - Post Comments (0)
 Posted: Sunday, June 2, 2002 » Scouter
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Another info update..
 Just added images to our former text only World Tournament info page. It now has some nifty images to help give you an idea on some of the things explained in our World Tournament page. This is just one of the many updates headed for you guys(and gals) this month. That's all for now...

 Register - Post Comments (2)
 Posted: Sunday, June 2, 2002 » fRaNk
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

New info section..
 Just added the newest addition to our site, Transformations. It has the transformations certain villains and good guys go through when becoming a stronger fighter. It currently has seven characters but it will soon grow to a larger section.

 Register - Post Comments (7)
 Posted: Friday, May 31, 2002 » fRaNk
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

More on the PS2 DBZ Game...
 Thanks to turles33, we now have a more info on one of the series of DBZ Games. "DBZ game will be coming to the PS2 November 30th! The web page has about 5 screens and it has little information. The screenshots are quite little... From what I can see the title of the game is obviously 'DragonBall Z - Legendary Super Warriors'." All of this was from the official Infogrames UK site, to visit the site click here. It looks like another DBGT Final Bout to me... IGN Insider users can see some more information on the game, it's almost the same information with more detail. It has the same screen shots and it. The only extra information is that it says it's two players and most PS2 games are 2 players...

 Register - Post Comments (11)
 Posted: Tuesday, May 28, 2002 » fRaNk
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

BlaBlaBla...You Bored???
 To all the New Zealand DBZ fans out there. There are rumors going around that Dragon Ball Z will restart again from the start of the Radditz Saga like it is now in America. This will not be happening because we still got allot of episodes left before we get to 241 and we already restarted the series 2 months ago. So If you heard about this, its not true. A new forum opened today named RiOT Forums which was created by Gekido and Operation Saiyan so if youre the kinda forum person click here to visit the forums and go crazy!!!!!

 Register - Post Comments (7)
 Posted: Sunday, May 26, 2002 » Sarugbyxl
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

DBGT Poll!
 Today, I went to the main Dragonball Z site to see if there was any news. Well, guess what they had up? They had a DBGT poll. Yes, when you go to the site, a pop-up will come up asking two things. 1.)Did you know there was a sequel after DBZ?, and 2.)Do you plan on watching it? Well, thats a given for me, no matter what anyone says. You may have already seen this, but if you haven't, click here!
Oh yeah. I wanted to tell you guys that i've played Legacy of Goku. Well, to say the least, I didn't like it. First off, i thought it was really cheesy. Second, the great Goku was killed by some wild dogs. I couldn't stop them. Well, for my rating, i give it a 5 out of 10. If you plan on buying, don't get your hopes up.

 Register - Post Comments (10)
 Posted: Saturday, May 25, 2002 » Scouter
